column9: SQL: SELECT DISTINCT p.id, p.prenom, p.nom, p.sexe, p.age, p.idportrait, p.oripathologies, p.canontags, p.canonadjs FROM patients p         JOIN patients_pathologies pp1 ON p.id = pp1.patient_id         JOIN pathologies pa1 ON pp1.pathologie_id = pa1.id         JOIN patients_pathologies pp2 ON p.id = pp2.patient_id         JOIN pathologies pa2 ON pp2.pathologie_id = pa2.id WHERE pa1.pathologie = ? AND pa2.pathologie = ? AND p.sexe = ? ORDER BY p.id LIMIT ? | params=['classe ii d angle', 'beance anterieure', 'F', 100]
